title: HM Courts and Tribunals Service Board meeting 10 July 2025
body: "The meeting discussed items including:   Conclusions from the Governance Review: Stage 2 Construction Project and Programme Delivery Process Review CEO Report Performance & Finance Updates National Services Update Existing Statutory Targets & indicators (‘Tipping Points’) Utilisation of Judicial Sitting Days 2025/26 Update on Jurisdictional Productivity Plan Implications of the Spending Review Settlement Update on the Criminal Court Improvement Group (CCIG) Any Other Business (AOB)  "
